_comment: Cross-language contract shared by the edge worker (TypeScript) and the backfill (Python). Both test suites pin their constants against this file (projects/worker/test/contract.test.ts, projects/common/tests/test_contract.py). Change values HERE first; a mismatch on either side must fail tests. The two BGE ids must name the same base model so edge queries and backfill upserts live in one embedding space.
